title: Fix Dockerfile.smithery: add USER, use bun, fix externals
description: Dockerfile.smithery: (1) no USER directive — runs as root (S3); (2) uses `npm ci` with package-lock.json while bun.lock is canonical (C7); (3) installs full devDependencies (C7, L23); (4) --external list missing dotenv, express-rate-limit (C8). Fix: use bun install --production, add USER bunjs (or similar) at end, add missing externals.
validation: Read Dockerfile.smithery, confirm USER directive added, bun install --production used, externals list complete.
